'''bahoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aracytidine|aracytidine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aracytidine|aracytidine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bahoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || bæheketh || bæhekej || bæhekesh || bæheke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || bahohokoth || bahohokoj || bahohokosh || bahohoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || bahokoth || bahokoj || bahokosh || bahoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || bahofkofth || bahofkofj || bahofkofsh || bahofkof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || bahokotho || bahokojo || bahokosho || bahokoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || bahokoth || bahokoj || bahokosh || bahoko
|-
| [[Possessive]] || bahokothol || bahokojol || bahokoshol || bahokokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || bahokoothotho || bahokoojojo || bahokooshosho || bahokooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || bahokothon || bahokojon || bahokoshon || bahokokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || bahokothooro || bahokojooro || bahokoshooro || bahokokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
